understanding.goal_understanding: The objective was to complete the KA59 puzzle by, in each level, positioning every selectable piece onto the goal tiles marked with '+' at the same time so the engine reports WIN, and then progressing through all levels until the overall game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Actions consisted of MOVE_* for grid movement and CLICK to select/command interaction at a specific coordinate; pieces could only move if the destination/path was not blocked by walls/obstacles, and when a CLICK targeted a reachable valid tile it could cause the currently selected piece to move to that tile, while clicks on blocked/invalid targets produced no movement. Selection could be switched by clicking on the other selectable piece’s position, and winning required all goal tiles to be occupied simultaneously within the finite step budget.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The objective was to complete the KA59 puzzle by, in each level, positioning every selectable piece onto the goal tiles marked with '+' at the same time so the engine reports WIN, and then progressing through all levels until the overall game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Actions consisted of MOVE_* for grid movement and CLICK to select/command interaction at a specific coordinate; pieces could only move if the destination/path was not blocked by walls/obstacles, and when a CLICK targeted a reachable valid tile it could cause the currently selected piece to move to that tile, while clicks on blocked/invalid targets produced no movement. Selection could be switched by clicking on the other selectable piece’s position, and winning required all goal tiles to be occupied simultaneously within the finite step budget.
